---
title: "Alejandro Pinto"
links:
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "linkedin", fill = "steelblue")` LinkedIn'
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/alejandro-pinto-s%C3%A1nchez-185471329/"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "github", fill = "steelblue")` Github'
    url: "https://github.com/AlejandroPintoS"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa(name = "envelope", fill = "steelblue")` Mail'
    url: "mailto:pintoalejandro.1g@gmail.com"
output:
  postcards::jolla
---

```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE} 
library(fontawesome)
```

#### **Bio** 

I am interested in learning about most bio areas to decide which is the best fit


#### **Education**

**Genomic sciences undergrad** | [ENES Juriquilla](https://www.instagram.com/enesjuriquilla/), Mexico | August 2024 - Present

#### **Experience**
**Internship** | @[LIIGH-UNAM](https://twitter.com/LIIGH_UNAM) | Dr. @[Sur Herrera Paredes](https://sur.science/) | Jan 2025 - Present

#### **Volunteering**

Effective Altruism Group Organizer @[EA_Querétaro](https://www.instagram.com/ae_queretaro/) | August 2025 - Present

[Club Astronómico Pakal](https://pakal.club/) | Oct 2023 - Jan 2025

Repository Contributions: 

Github [Physarum Image Detection](https://github.com/ecoevolab/Physarum_Image_Detection) | Dr. Sur Herrera Paredes
